details.message:
left 臂连接异常: ArmKinetix requires the 'kinetix' extra (Pinocchio). Install it with: pip install linkerbot-py[kinetix]
Note: Pinocchio does not support pip install on Windows. Use conda instead: conda install pinocchio -c conda-forge
